For System Execution Errors, I need to check if there were any API issues. Looking at the spans, all the LiteLLMModel.__call__ spans have status_code "Ok", so no API errors like rate limiting or authentication issues. So no System Execution Errors here.

Planning and Coordination Errors: The agent's plan involved using the search_agent, but the steps didn't correctly retrieve the necessary information.
